summary: Verified all teacher department_ids and course teacher_name fixes. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend department filter and delete modal working correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - minor React Native rendering issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher department_ids fix verified: POST/PUT /api/teachers correctly extracts first element from department_ids array. Course teacher_name resolution verified via GET /api/courses. Department filter working - shows correct teacher counts per department. Delete modal using proper Modal component with Arabic error messages from backend.

verified_fixes.teacher_create_with_department_ids: PASSED - Backend extracts first element from department_ids array and stores as department_id
verified_fixes.teacher_update_with_department_ids: PASSED - Update endpoint handles department_ids array correctly
verified_fixes.course_teacher_name_resolution: PASSED - All 5 courses show teacher names (Saeed, أستاذ اختبار 180156, حسن صالح, زين سالم)
verified_fixes.teacher_filter_by_department: PASSED - Dropdown shows correct counts: الكل(3), الشريعة والقانون(2), الدراسات الإسلامية(1). Filter correctly hides teachers from other departments
verified_fixes.department_delete_modal: PASSED - Uses Modal instead of Alert.alert. Shows Arabic error message: 'لا يمكن حذف القسم - يوجد 4 طالب مرتبط به'
verified_fixes.department_delete_protection: PASSED - Returns 400 with Arabic error when department has associated students
verified_fixes.course_delete_protection: PASSED - Returns 400 with Arabic error when course has enrollments
